name: trends_surfer
description: Natural-language access to Google Trends. Claude asks in plain language; the plugin drives a stealth Chrome session (Patchright + anti-detection) to pull interest-over-time, related queries/topics, interest-by-region and trending-now, writes the full result to a temp file, and returns only a compact index. A non-bypassable randomized delay (30-90s) is enforced server-side between requests.
